description: Style Note Super soft vintage leather and a variety of hues to choose from, wallets from fossil are the way to go for a look that chic and versatile effortlessly. Spice up your outfit with these funky yet conventional wallets and get ready to be on top of your game! Product Details Brown wallet that has a flap with a buttoned closure, two insert pockets with an inner zipped pocket, six card holders on one side, six card holders and an id card holder on the other side, zipped pocket at the back, multi coloured detail on the flap with branding on the metallic keyhole detail and stitch detailing Material and Care Vintage leather Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt Dimensions:10.5 cm x 19 cm
